description: NEC code essentials, wire sizing, conduit fill, grounding, area classifications
conduit_fill_rule: 40% max fill for 3+ conductors (NEC Chapter 9 Table 1)

ground_rod.max_resistance: 25 ohms — if exceeded, add supplemental rod min 6 ft apart
ground_rod.connections: Exothermic weld (Cadweld) or listed clamp only

area_classifications.class_I_div_1: Ignitable concentrations under normal conditions. RMC or MI cable only. XP fittings. Seals within 18 in of enclosures.
area_classifications.class_I_div_2: Ignitable concentrations only under abnormal conditions. RMC, IMC, EMT, MC-HL, TC cable allowed. Non-sparking or XP equipment.

gas_groups.D: Gasoline, propane, natural gas — most common in refineries

area_classifications.seal_requirements: Within 18 in of enclosure in Div 1, at boundary classified/unclassified, chico compound fill to 100%

working_clearances_nec_110_26.151_to_600V: 3 ft to 4 ft depending on conditions
working_clearances_nec_110_26.rule: Never store materials in electrical clearance zones

torque_general_guidelines.rule: ALWAYS use manufacturer spec on equipment label. Use calibrated torque wrench.

voltage_drop: Max 3% branch circuit, 5% total (branch + feeder) recommended by NEC
